criteria.text: Proxy-aware TLS enforcement (env-gated): FORCE_HTTPS=1 + trust proxy redirects X-Forwarded-Proto http to https; https proceeds; unset = no redirect (local dev).

HSTS + secure cookies under production config: enforcement on => Strict-Transport-Security header and session cookie Secure+HttpOnly+SameSite=Lax (COOKIE_SECURE gates); off => no HSTS, cookie not forced Secure.

Secrets server-side only; tokens never persisted: app credentials read only from env/secret-source behind a single config accessor (vault-ready), never hardcoded, never to browser; per-visitor OAuth tokens in-memory only, never to disk, never to browser.
Audit middleware on all /api routes: every /api request (read/write/denied/401/503) records an audit entry (method, path, status, ms; never bodies, never PHI), mounted before the router.
PHI-/secret-safe logging on error paths: error on a source-read path logs ids/paths/references only, never PHI values, never secret/token values.
